name: AWP | 石墨黑
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. This memento from Agency has been painted in a polygon pattern with metallic paints of various reflectivities over a chrome base coat. Pencils down, hands up
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把来自办公大楼的纪念武器以铬为外表，配上多边形图案，使用拥有不同反射率的金属涂料进行了涂装。 放下铅笔，举起手来
